message:
fix(node): include revocations in trust_fabric convergence digest + bound elevation_history

trust_fabric: compute_digest omitted the revocations BTreeSet, causing
false convergence when two nodes differed only in revoked artifacts.
Also replaced \x00 delimiters with length-prefix encoding to prevent
hash collisions from concatenation ambiguity.

isolation_mesh: elevation_history.push() was unbounded — replaced with
push_bounded(MAX_ELEVATION_HISTORY=256) to cap per-workload growth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
